gist.headline: CatGPT lands on its feet
gist.blurb: The feline chatbot gets a full grooming session with fresh code, better SEO, and a stylish new look.
gist.summary: Updated the CatGPT community app with the latest codebase, improved SEO configuration, and refactored frontend logic.
gist.impact: Users will see a more polished interface and improved reliability when chatting with their favorite AI cat.
gist.visual_concept: CatGPT represents a feline take on AI. Visual symbols: Pixel cat, chat bubbles, yarn balls made of code. Scene: Polly the Bee visiting a cozy cat condo where a pixel cat is typing on a laptop.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the bee mascot sitting next to a cute white pixel cat who is typing on a tiny laptop. A speech bubble says 'MEOW'. Lime green (#ecf874) and soft pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
